ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder for the generated Roam Graph Canvas. Leave empty to use the vault root.
ast.target: 用于生成 Roam Graph Canvas 的文件夹。留空则使用保险库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum linked notes to show in each layer on both sides of the active note.
ast.target: 在活动笔记两侧的每一层中显示的最大链接笔记数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum nearby daily notes to show on each side of the active daily note.
ast.target: 在活动每日笔记两侧显示的最大附近每日笔记数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Roam Graph could not open the right sidebar.
ast.target: Roam Graph 无法打开右侧边栏。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Roam Graph rewrites this Canvas whenever the active Markdown note changes. Native Canvas remains editable; manual edits may be overwritten.
ast.target: 每当活动 Markdown 笔记更改时，Roam Graph 都会重写此 Canvas。原生 Canvas 保持可编辑；手动编辑可能会被覆盖。
